base_checkpoint_selection: highest unweighted manifest-v5 validation macro-F1 within the pre-frozen three-epoch linear-head schedule
calibration: equal-source weighting across the six declared field validation sources, with the pre-frozen minimum temperature 1.5

fixed_thresholds.selection_source: preexisting hierarchical_contract_v5.json mismatch policy with no confidence rejection

expected_crop_source_in_product: trusted crop-cycle metadata supplied by the API request
